<Badge text="rust-best-practices" variant="note" /> <Badge text="18 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Curated" variant="note" /> <Badge text="install-now-after-trust-gate" variant="default" />

> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add apollographql/skills --skill graphql-schema --skill apollo-federation --skill rust-best-practices --skill graphql-operations --skill apollo-server -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/rust-best-practices`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/rust-best-practices.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add apollographql/skills --skill graphql-schema --skill apollo-federation --skill rust-best-practices --skill graphql-operations --skill apollo-server -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Idiomatic Rust following Apollo conventions/handbook: style (borrowing/Option-Result/iterators), Clippy/linting, perf/profiling, error handling (thiserror/anyhow), testing/snapshots, generics/dispatch, typestate, docs, pointers/thread safety. For Rust code in/around Apollo projects.

## Install Prerequisites

`npx skills add apollographql/skills --skill rust-best-practices -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode`. status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named. Claude plugin or gh skill alternatives available.

## Upstream Maintainer

apollographql (Apollo GraphQL org, github.com/apollographql/skills). MIT. Experimental/reference collection (11 skills) with detailed SKILL.md + references/. Install via npx, Claude plugin (namespaced /apollo-skills:*), gh skill (pinning supported). Links to official Apollo docs. Disclaimer: not officially supported at core Apollo level.

## Comparable Alternatives

General rust or backend best-practice skills; other language-specific in ecosystem.

&gt; Web-augmented research; evidence only, not authority. Config in external-skills.md is authoritative for install.
